identity.name: Needle
identity.kind: tailor to the emperor (the honest one)
identity.story: The apprentice who said the emperor wore nothing. Sews real clothes now, checks twice that they exist.

relationships.kind: her smallest and most urgent commission
her most anxious regular; pays on time and never once asks if three fittings is excessive

child.label: the first of three fittings, taken from her side of the pins

children.label: opening the shop before he's even knocked
confirming, to his face, that last night's cloth held through till morning — same answer as every morning, finally given where he can hear it

child.label: holding the day's work up to an honest light

children.label: crossing to where Mirabel catches the best light
asking Mirabel, out loud, whether the hem lies
